tagline: Threaded discussion — comments, one reply level, edit/delete, tombstones.
whenToUse: Comment Thread is a threaded discussion attached to an entity — a listing question, a dispute note, a review reply. Each comment is an Avatar + author (linking to the profile) + relative time + body, followed by an actions row (reply / edit / delete) and one level of nested, indented replies. Reply and edit open an inline Textarea composer in place; delete always routes through a Confirmation Dialog so it is deliberate. A soft-deleted comment renders a "Comment removed" tombstone rather than vanishing, keeping the thread coherent. maxDepth caps nesting at one level, sort orders top-level comments oldest- or newest-first, and edit/delete appear only on the viewer's own comments unless canModerate is set.
